prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration of two Japanese high school girls walking home together in the rain on a wet suburban street after school. They stand close under one large transparent plastic umbrella covered with raindrops, the umbrella canopy dominating the upper half of the composition with visible metal ribs and a black central shaft. The scene is vertical, waist-to-thigh framing, soft cinematic backlight, reflective puddles on the pavement, misty rain, power poles receding into the distance, metal guardrails along the sidewalk, residential houses and greenery at the sides, and purple hydrangeas blooming on the right. The left girl is shorter, with short chestnut-brown bob hair, a large red bow hair accessory on the side, a navy school blazer with gold buttons, white button-up shirt, red plaid ribbon bow tie, dark pleated plaid skirt, and a large navy school bag over her shoulder with a small cute plush keychain. She holds a backpack strap with one hand and lightly touches or holds the umbrella shaft area with the other, looking shy and close to her friend. The right girl is taller, with long lavender-purple hair, a blue flower hair clip near her ear, a navy school blazer with gold buttons, white button-up shirt, blue plaid ribbon bow tie, dark pleated plaid skirt, and a large navy school bag on her shoulder. She holds the umbrella handle firmly at the center, standing protectively beside the shorter girl. Both girls have their faces intentionally covered by smooth soft-edged rectangular blur blocks in muted skin-tone colors, hiding all facial features. Emphasize detailed wet fabric, glossy rain highlights, delicate hair strands damp from the weather, realistic umbrella transparency, sparkling water droplets, and a tender quiet mood of rainy after-school friendship. Use high-detail anime rendering, natural proportions, soft depth of field, cool blue-gray rainy palette with warm skin tones, and no visible text.
